judge_reason: Description B quotes specific, verbatim text from two ink stamps and a handwritten annotation that Description A describes only as 'mostly illegible' and 'two official ink stamps' without any legible text, creating a direct factual contradiction on the visual content of the images.
original_image_tags: Aged, light brown or manila document page with visible foxing and age spots. The top of the page shows two hole-punch circles and a torn edge. The main body of the page contains faint, mostly illegible typed text that appears to be the reverse side of a document showing through, or very faded text. Two official ink stamps are visible at the bottom.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A faded scanned document page with no discernible picture content, showing two punched holes at the top, faint typewritten text, and several reversed ink stamps near the bottom.*
